# MorForm

> MorForm is a suite of three construction apps for small crews and contractors: field time tracking, FLHA/JHA safety forms, expense tracking, job estimates, dispatch and field reports. There are no accounts, no cloud and no subscription — each app is a one-time purchase, all data stays on the user's device, and the apps exchange data peer-to-peer via email attachments.

Key facts:
- MorForm (Supervisor) — iOS & Android, $6.99 one-time. Field time tracking, expenses with receipt photos, FLHA/JHA, site hazard inspections, emergency response plans, incident reports; emails timesheets, expense reports and safety forms to the right manager.
- MorForm Manager — iOS & Android, $6.99 one-time. Dispatches jobs to supervisors (.morjob), builds estimates and budgets, reviews supervisor reports (.morrep), change orders, client invoicing.
- MorForm Office — Windows 10/11 desktop, $9.99 one-time. Full job management, CSI-style estimates with custom columns, PDF client quotes, crew and vendor directories, report review; syncs with Manager mobile (.mordata).
- Privacy model: no accounts, no cloud, no tracking, no ads. Data leaves the device only as email attachments the user sends.
- Works offline; built by a working site supervisor in Edmonton, Alberta, Canada.

## Apps
- [MorForm on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/morform/id6744827471)
- [MorForm on Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.bryceduhamel.morform)
- [MorForm Manager on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/ca/app/morform-manager/id6772639424)
- [MorForm Office on the Microsoft Store](https://apps.microsoft.com/store/detail/morform-office/9MWDMMJRBFZ0)
